skills.name: Aspersion
skills.description: Sprinkle holy water to increase physical defense on you and your allies.
skills.effect_text:
Physical Defense: + CaptionRatio %
Targets: 10
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Monstrance
skills.description: Increases the damage given to the enemy in front.
skills.effect_text:
Damage given to the enemy + CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Resurrection
skills.description: Resurrects a target that has been defeated in combat.
skills.effect_text:
Recover HP by CaptionRatio % when recovering after becoming incapable of combat
[Resurrection: Denounce] Skill Factor: CaptionRatio3 % x 4
[Resurrection: Denounce] Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Sacrament
skills.description: Apply [Guilt] to the enemies nearby to damage every second.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Target: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Revive
skills.description: Prevents one from becoming Incapable of Combat once.
skills.effect_text:
HP Recovery: CaptionRatio %
Invincibility: CaptionRatio2 seconds
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Mass Heal
skills.description: Restores the HP of nearby allies.
skills.effect_text:
Healing Factor CaptionRatio %
[Mass Heal: Brilliance] Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 % x 4
[Mass Heal: Brilliance] Number of Target CaptionRatio3

skills.name: Turn Undead
skills.description: Inflicts Holy-property magic damage to enemies all around, with a chance of defeating Mutant or Devil enemies instantly
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Increased Maximum Weight
attributes.description: * Increases the character's maximum inventory weight by 20 per attribute level

attributes.name: Aspersion: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Aspersion]'s physical defense increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Revive: Duration
attributes.description:
* Increases duration of [Revive] by 7 seconds per attribute level

* Not applicable in TBL or GvG

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Mass Heal: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the heal factor of [Mass Heal] and skill factor of [Mass Heal: Brilliance] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added bonus at maximum level

attributes.name: Monstrance: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Monstrance]'s damage increasing effects by 0.1% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Turn Undead: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Turn Undead] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sacrament: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Sacrament] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Resurrection: Quick Regen
attributes.description:
* The HP recovery of [Resurrection] is converted into a shield instead, and the target receives 100% more healing for 10 seconds

* The shield does not stack with the following shield buffs, and new shields will not apply if they are not larger than the current shield.

- Templar [Shield Charger]

- Peltasta [High Guard] shield effect

- [Gyvenimas' Protection] effect

- [Armaos Card] effect

attributes.name: [Arts] Mass Heal: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the heal factor of [Mass Heal] and Skill Factor of [Mass Heal: Brilliance] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Turn Undead: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Turn Undead] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Mass Heal: Shield
attributes.description:
* Decreases heal of [Mass Heal] by half

* Creates shield by 20% of maximum HP of heal applied character when the amount of HP healed by the [Mass Heal] exceeds the maximum HP

* Decreases Heal by half, Shield applied target does not create shield by [Mass Heal].

attributes.name: [Arts] Sacrament: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Sacrament] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Aspersion: Protection
attributes.description:
* Original effect of [Aspersion] removed

* Cast a protective barrier equal to 10% of the Maximum HP to the allies when casting [Aspersion]

* Cooldown increases by 10 seconds

* Duration 15 seconds

attributes.name: Resurrection: Denounce
attributes.description:
* Removes the original effect of [Resurrection]

* When casting [Resurrection], damages the target in range with holy property and recovers your HP by (number of targets x1%)

attributes.name: Turn Undead: Death
attributes.description:
* Normal monster instant death effect of [Turn Undead] is applied to every type of monsters

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Mass Heal: Brilliance
attributes.description:
* Removes the original effect of [Mass Heal]

* When casting [Mass Heal], damages the target in range with holy property

* Decreases Cooldown by 15 seconds

attributes.name: Resurrection: Denounce Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Resurrection: Denounce] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Resurrection: Denounce Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Resurrection: Condemn] by 1.25% per attribute level
